description: The act of presenting an artistic work to an audience. It is the embodied, mindful act of bringing a creative piece to life in a shared, present moment.
rationale: The soft 'sh' creates the intimate space of shared attention. The resonant 'lo' fills that space with presence and voice, while the open 'a' releases the performance into the world. This creates a word that feels like art coming alive - beginning in focused intention, resonating with full presence, then opening to touch all who witness.
